_gioi_thieu: File rule kiem tra chat luong convert method Business Logic (VB.NET -> ASP.NET Core CQRS, theo documents/04 muc 2.6 va documents/03 muc 11). Tool doc file nay de quet; nguoi review doc de hieu tieu chi. Sua/them rule o day KHONG can sua code — dat file canh exe (thu muc rules/) hoac tro bang CLI --rules. Tat toan bo bang config.json: "rules": {"enabled": false}.
_cach_doc: Moi rule khi trung se sinh ghi chu 'RULE <id>: <title>' tren dong method trong bang ket qua/Excel. Rule chi la DIEM CAN REVIEW TAY — khong tru diem C1-C5. Ngoai le duy nhat: JP-MSG (thieu message tieng Nhat = kha nang thieu nhanh check nghiep vu) se nang PASS -> WARNING.

_tieu_chi_C1_C5.C1 (30d): Method ton tai o ca 2 he thong (khop ten / hau to Async / bang mapping thu cong)
_tieu_chi_C1_C5.C2 (20d): So luong + kieu tham so (DataTable -> List<DTO> chi canh bao)
_tieu_chi_C1_C5.C3 (15d): Kieu tra ve (Task<X> ~ X; Boolean -> Result pattern chi canh bao)
_tieu_chi_C1_C5.C4 (15d): Cau truc dieu khien: so if / vong lap / try / return / throw
_tieu_chi_C1_C5.C5 (20d): Do tuong dong logic sau chuan hoa token (>=0.75 OK, 0.5-0.75 WARN, <0.5 NG; khoan dung soft-delete, DataTable->DTO, dao thu tu cau lenh)
_tieu_chi_C1_C5.SQL: SQL phia C# con cu phap Oracle (NVL/DECODE/ROWNUM/SYSDATE/DUAL/.NEXTVAL/(+)) -> toi thieu WARNING

vb_patterns.title: CInt() lam tron kieu banker's rounding
vb_patterns.detail: CInt(0.5)=0, CInt(1.5)=2 (lam tron ve so chan gan nhat). (int) va Convert.ToInt32 cua C# hanh xu khac ((int) cat cut phan thap phan). Voi tien/thue, lech 1 don vi la bug that.
vb_patterns.advice: Xem ben C# dung gi: (int) / Convert.ToInt32 / Math.Round. Neu can giu nguyen hanh vi VB thi phai dung Math.Round(x, MidpointRounding.ToEven) roi ep kieu.

vb_patterns.title: Toan tu chia nguyen \ cua VB
vb_patterns.detail: VB phan biet / (chia thuc: 7/2=3.5) va \ (chia nguyen: 7\2=3). C# chi co / va ket qua phu thuoc kieu du lieu — dich may moc rat de sai.
vb_patterns.advice: Kiem tra phep chia tuong ung ben C# co ep ve int truoc khi chia khong, va nghiep vu can chia nguyen hay chia thuc.

vb_patterns.title: IIf() tinh ca 2 ve
vb_patterns.detail: IIf(dk, a, b) cua VB LUON tinh ca a va b (co the gay loi null/side-effect o ve khong duoc chon). Toan tu ?: cua C# chi tinh ve duoc chon.
vb_patterns.advice: Xac nhan ve khong duoc chon co side effect / co the throw khong; hanh vi moi (?:) thuong DUNG hon nhung khac hanh vi cu.

vb_patterns.title: On Error (nuot loi ngam)
vb_patterns.detail: On Error Resume Next lam moi loi bi bo qua va code chay tiep. Convert 'sach' sang try/catch hoac bo di se DOI hanh vi: cho truoc day loi van chay tiep, gio se dung/throw.
vb_patterns.advice: Xac nhan voi nghiep vu tung cho: loi nao duoc phep nuot, loi nao phai chan. Day la diem rui ro hanh vi cao nhat khi convert.

vb_patterns.title: Truy cap .Rows(0) khi bang co the rong
vb_patterns.detail: VB: bang rong -> throw exception (thuong bi catch dau do). C# EF: FirstOrDefault tra null/0 em ru -> luong loi cu bien thanh luong 'thanh cong voi gia tri rong'.
vb_patterns.advice: Xem ben C# xu ly truong hop khong co du lieu nhu the nao (FirstOrDefault + check null? SingleAsync throw?) va doi chieu voi hanh vi nghiep vu mong muon.

vb_patterns.title: So sanh chuoi rong ("" vs Nothing)
vb_patterns.detail: VB coi (s = "") la True khi s Is Nothing. C# thi "" == null la False. Moi cho check chuoi rong deu co nguy co doi ket qua khi gia tri la null.
vb_patterns.advice: Ben C# nen dung string.IsNullOrEmpty(s) thay vi s == "". Kiem tra cho tuong ung.

vb_patterns.title: And/Or khong short-circuit
vb_patterns.detail: And/Or cua VB (khac AndAlso/OrElse) LUON tinh ca 2 ve. Dich sang &&/|| cua C# (short-circuit) lam ve phai co the khong duoc goi nua — khac hanh vi neu ve phai co side effect hoac can chay de validate.
vb_patterns.advice: Xem ve phai co goi ham/gan gia tri khong. Neu chi la so sanh thuan thi && la dung va an toan.

cs_patterns.title: Sync-over-async (.Result / .Wait())
cs_patterns.detail: Block thread de doi task trong ASP.NET Core de gay deadlock/can kiet thread pool, dac biet khi convert code sync cua WinForms sang async.
cs_patterns.advice: Doi sang await. Neu method goi chua async duoc thi async hoa ca chuoi goi.

cs_patterns.title: Goi async bi bo ket qua (_ = XxxAsync(...))
cs_patterns.detail: Check nghiep vu goi kieu fire-and-forget se luon 'pass' vi khong ai doi/doc ket qua — mat han mot buoc kiem tra so voi ban VB.
cs_patterns.advice: Them await va xu ly ket qua tra ve.

jp_message.title: Message tieng Nhat cua VB khong thay ben C#
jp_message.detail: Theo documents/04 muc 2.6: MessageBox/Throw cua VB phai thanh Result.Failure(message tieng Nhat) ben C#. Message bien mat = kha nang THIEU ca nhanh check nghiep vu (hoac quen return sau Failure). Vi la nghi van loi that nen PASS bi nang len WARNING.

self_exclusion.title: Nghi thieu dieu kien loai tru chinh record
self_exclusion.detail: Method check trung/ton tai ma SQL cu co <> / != (loai tru chinh minh khi update) nhung LINQ moi khong co != — update chinh record se bao trung sai.

validator_split.title: Mot phan check co the da tach sang FluentValidation
validator_split.detail: Kien truc moi (documents/04) tach check dinh dang/bat buoc nhap sang [Screen]Validators.cs chay TRUOC handler. Khi C4/C5 lech va cung thu muc co *Validators.cs, doi chieu file do truoc khi ket luan thieu logic.

rownum_order.title: First/Take khong co OrderBy (goc la ROWNUM)
rownum_order.detail: SQL cu dung ROWNUM co the dua vao thu tu ngam cua Oracle. EF Core First/Take khong co OrderBy thi thu tu KHONG dam bao -> 'lay dong dau' thanh lay dong ngau nhien.
